meaning: n.维姬(Victoria& 的昵称 亦作 Vickie,Viki)(f.)
examples: Vicky needs to close a project tonight.
He darted Vicky an impatient look.
He darted an impatient look at Vicky.
Vicky contributes to a forum on the web for couples who are about to get married.
Vicky Bell told WPSD-TV that she called 911 when her mobile home caught fire.
